name: cartog
description: Code graph navigation and semantic search for LLM coding agents

hooks.command: echo 'When answering questions about this codebase, prefer using cartog MCP tools (cartog_search, cartog_rag_search, cartog_refs, cartog_outline, cartog_impact, cartog_callees, cartog_hierarchy, cartog_deps, cartog_changes) over Grep, Glob, and Read for code navigation, search, and structural queries. Use cartog_rag_search as the default entry point for finding code. Only fall back to Grep/Read for string literals, config values, or reading actual implementation logic.'
